description: The public debate regarding the Canada-US Safe Third Country Agreement (STCA) and its modernization to include irregular border crossings at Roxham Road. This highlights the tension between international refugee obligations and border control.

key_events.description: Sharp rise in irregular crossings at Roxham Road becomes daily news.
Conservative Party calls for immediate border closure to refugees.
Trudeau government successfully negotiates STCA expansion with Biden admin.

calibration_notes: Illustrates how economic and social pressure can shift a traditionally liberal consensus on immigration.
